ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time period when the data was collected */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of data (e.g., temperature, precipitation) */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station that collected the data */,
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the satellite that collected the data */,
  "radar_system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the radar system that collected the data */,
  "value" REAL /* Actual value of the weather data */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the weather data (e.g., Celsius, mm) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_satellite_id FOREIGN KEY ("satellite_id") REFERENCES satellites ("satellite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_radar_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("radar_system_id") REFERENCES radar_systems ("radar_system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_time_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("time_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("weather_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time period */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Interval of the time period (e.g., daily, monthly, yearly) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the time period (e.g., hourly, daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the data type (e.g., temperature, precipitation) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the data type (e.g., max, min, avg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the station is located */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of the weather station (e.g., surface, satellite) */,
  "station_status" TEXT /* Status of the weather station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellites" (
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite */,
  "satellite_name" TEXT /* Name of the satellite */,
  "orbit" TEXT /* Orbit of the satellite (e.g., geostationary, polar) */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the satellite data */,
  "satellite_type" TEXT /* Type of the satellite (e.g., geostationary, polar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satellite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "radar_systems" (
  "radar_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each radar system */,
  "radar_system_name" TEXT /* Name of the radar system */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the radar system */,
  "range" REAL /* Range of the radar system */,
  "radar_type" TEXT /* Type of the radar system (e.g., Doppler, phased array) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("radar_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., research, operations) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the summary */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the summary */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean value of the weather data */,
  "std" REAL /* Standard deviation of the weather data */,
  "min" REAL /* Minimum value of the weather data */,
  "25%" REAL /* 25th percentile of the weather data */,
  "50%" REAL /* 50th percentile of the weather data */,
  "75%" REAL /* 75th percentile of the weather data */,
  "max" REAL /* Maximum value of the weather data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_summaries_weather_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("weather_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yearly_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the summary */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean value of the weather data */,
  "std" REAL /* Standard deviation of the weather data */,
  "min" REAL /* Minimum value of the weather data */,
  "25%" REAL /* 25th percentile of the weather data */,
  "50%" REAL /* 50th percentile of the weather data */,
  "75%" REAL /* 75th percentile of the weather data */,
  "max" REAL /* Maximum value of the weather data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yearly_summaries_weather_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("weather_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being assessed */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the weather data */,
  "quality_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the quality of the weather data */,
  "quality_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality assessment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being validated */,
  "validation_score" REAL /* Score indicating the validity of the weather data */,
  "validation_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the validity of the weather data */,
  "validation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_certification" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being certified */,
  "certification_level" TEXT /* Level of certification (e.g., Level 1, Level 2) */,
  "certification_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the certification */,
  "certification_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the certification was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_certification_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_publication" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was published */,
  "publication_time" TEXT /* Time when the weather data was published */,
  "publication_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_publication_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_disclaimer" (
  "disclaimer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disclaimer */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being disclaimed */,
  "disclaimer_text" TEXT /* Text of the disclaimer */,
  "disclaimer_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the disclaimer was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disclaimer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_disclaimer_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)
